subcodes.first_line: Today, the most paramount of matters is steadfastness and firmness in the Cause of God. The Ancient Beauty hath enjoined upon the loved ones of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم اعظم امور ثبوت و رسوخ بر امرالله است جمال قدم احبای الهی را از برای
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @House of Justice, @unity; oneness of humanity
